description: Checks if given position is inside road segment. Same as [[roadAt]], only return is boolean instead of road object.
name: isOnRoad

Item.desc: or [[Position#PositionAGL|PositionAGL]] (especially on bridges) or {{GVI|arma3|2.00|size= 0.75}} [[Position#Introduction|Position2D]], in which case Z will be automatically deduced as the height of the road surface
Item.name: position
